project.name: RAGFlow
project.stack: Flask backend, React/TypeScript frontend (UmiJS, Ant Design), Docker Compose, MySQL, Elasticsearch/Infinity, Redis, MinIO; iOS: SwiftUI, GRDB, EPUBKit, PDFKit, Accelerate, marmelroy/Zip

completed: Phase 1–4: All previously complete (P1.1–P1.6, P2, P2.5, iOS live testing phases 1–4)
Phase 5 DONE — DOCX/XLSX/PPTX/EML format expansion
Phase 6 DONE — WorkflowRunner + 5 templates + full UI
Session 2026-03-25: Bug fixes and feature additions from user testing feedback:
Fix 1 — PDF import security scope race: copy-to-temp before releasing scope (eliminates race)
Fix 2 — Chat history persistence: save user msg immediately on send; save assistant on all
exit paths; targeted rollback via deleteMessage(id:) on empty cancellation
Fix 3 — Clear Chat button: moved from toolbar (unreliable through TabView) into kbScopeBar,
shown only when messages.isEmpty == false
Fix 4 — Suggested chat prompts: now document-aware (generated from KB book titles via
buildSuggestedPrompts()); 3 cases: 0 books (generic), 1 book, 2 books, 3+ books
Fix 5 — Import Documents button added to non-empty library (Section footer in bookList)
Phase 7 Hardening:
P7.2 — Replaced 3 try! calls in DatabaseService.init with do/catch { fatalError(...) }
P7.3 — Added MARKETING_VERSION=1.0 + CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION=1 to both build configs
P7.4 — Added PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy (NSPrivacyTracking=false, UserDefaults CA92.1)
Session 2026-03-25 (landscape QA): All 5 simulator fixes verified on iPad Pro 13-inch M5 iOS 26.4
— Simulator click calibration: scale_x=0.3526, scale_y=0.3565, chrome_x=54, chrome_y=91
Workflow editor overhaul (commit 54bfaf3, 2026-03-25):
— 3 new StepTypes: rewrite (LLM query rewriting), message (static text injection),
webSearch (Brave Search API via existing ToolExecutor)
— WorkflowEditorView: iOS Shortcuts-style vertical step list with tap-to-configure
(StepConfigSheet), swipe-to-delete, drag-to-reorder (EditButton), Add Step picker
— StepTypePicker: sheet listing all 7 step types with icon, displayName, stepDescription
— StepConfigSheet: per-type Form fields (prompt editor, query variable, top-K stepper,
KB override picker, output slot)
— WorkflowDetailView: Edit toolbar button → WorkflowEditorView sheet; saves to DB and
refreshes in place; uses shared StepTypeIcon view for all 7 types
— WorkflowListView row: now shows step count (e.g. 'RAG Q&A · 4 steps')
— StepType.displayName and .stepDescription computed properties added
next_steps: — P7.1: Fresh install wipe test end-to-end on real device
— Set DEVELOPMENT_TEAM in Xcode Signing & Capabilities for real-device deployment
— Test PDF import fix on real device (copy-to-temp before scope release)
— TestFlight: Archive → Distribute → App Store Connect
— Add Categorize step type (branching — breaks linear model, needs design work)
— Add WorkflowTemplates using new rewrite/webSearch step types
— Investigate Deep Summarizer 'Failed' status (root cause uninvestigated)
— Brave Search API key entry in SettingsView (currently keychain only, no UI field)

phase_status.iOS_live_testing_phase1: COMPLETE — ATS plist, AppIcon asset catalog, PBXResourcesBuildPhase
phase_status.iOS_live_testing_phase2: COMPLETE — API guards, provider banner, Settings accessible, debug helpers
phase_status.iOS_live_testing_phase3: COMPLETE — chat history persisted to SQLite (messages + message_sources)
phase_status.iOS_live_testing_phase4: COMPLETE — ingest off main thread, scan-once guard, phase progress labels
phase_status.iOS_live_testing_phase5_formats: COMPLETE — DOCX/XLSX/PPTX via Zip, EML pure Swift
phase_status.iOS_live_testing_phase7_hardening: MOSTLY COMPLETE (P7.2/P7.3/P7.4 done; P7.1 real-device test pending)
phase_status.iOS_bug_fixes_2026-03-25: COMPLETE — PDF import, chat persistence, clear chat, suggested prompts, import button
phase_status.iOS_landscape_QA_2026-03-25: COMPLETE — all fixes verified on iPad Pro 13-inch M5 iOS 26.4 landscape
phase_status.iOS_workflow_editor_2026-03-25: COMPLETE — WorkflowEditorView + 3 new step types, commit 54bfaf3

known_gaps.code_signing: DEVELOPMENT_TEAM not set — user must configure in Xcode for real device
known_gaps.workflow_failed: Deep Summarizer shown as 'Failed' in user screenshot — root cause uninvestigated
known_gaps.brave_search_ui: Brave Search API key has no Settings UI field — stored in keychain only
known_gaps.workflow_categorize: Categorize/Switch step types not yet implemented — requires branching design beyond linear model

last_commit.message: Feat(iOS): Workflow editor — Shortcuts-style step builder with 3 new step types
